violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Plastic bowls being left in/used as scoop in dry inredients (i.e. flour).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Strainer in clean storage had dry food debris in screen. *Moved to dirty dish bin during inspection.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory did not have a mixing valve or combination faucet. -Hot water is not working at hand sink faucet.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Bread loafs are stored loose on bottom shelf and on top shelf commingling with frozen store bought items in upright freezer.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Bag of flour on floor.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Facility is out of paper towels.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Back door left open for ventilation but is not screened. -Window screens left open between use.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
